message:
fix(codegen): Fail fast on missing modules instead of warning

Changed missing module warnings to hard errors. When a test imports
a module that doesn't exist in the runtime, codegen now fails immediately
with error.MissingModule instead of silently continuing.

This prevents:
- Silent failures that cause CI to report success
- Confusing partial compilation that hangs later
- Tests running with missing dependencies

Now failures are loud, immediate, and traceable.
